title: PDB3D's Blocky Armor Stands - Arms Version
description: A Resource pack adding a Blockier Armor Stand Model. Requires Optifine or EntityModelFeatures
body:
# Blocky Armor Stands - Arms Version
Replaces the armor stand model and item texture with a blockier version.

Requires [Optifine](https://optifine.net/home) or [EntityModelFeatures](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) !

Non-Arms version: https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pdb3ds-blocky-armor-stands

### **NOTE! Versions**

There are **2 Versions** of this resource pack. Default version and Arms version!. 

Default versions shows arms with showarms nbt data. Without it it has just stubs.

Arms version shows the arms without the showarms nbt data. 

if you have a mod that enables arms on armor stands, or a map that uses them or prefer no arms at all: Use default version!
if you want armor stands with arms in situations where they normally have no arms, like vanilla survival, use the arms version (arms are then just visual and will not hold items)

You have the ability to **rename the armor stand for different skins** 
armorstand15.png can be replaced with a player skin, this skin will then show up on an armor stand named "Player"

Current names for skins are: 
Player 
Steve 
Alex 
Oak_Planks 
Spruce_Planks 
Birch_Planks 
Jungle_Planks 
Acacia_Planks 
Dark_Oak_Planks 
Mangrove_Planks 
Cherry_Planks 
Pale_Oak_Planks 
Bamboo_Planks 
Crimson_Planks 
Warped_Planks

![versions](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a0462bd6c59470b94e8b09a0eb4a33e760cac147.png)

![Armor Stands](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ed7aa6dd160de9a3b2beb660ed549c0a9f998a12.png)
